message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "Actor" as Actor
participant "ConditionalFormattingCellExtensionAction" as Action
participant "ConditionalFormattingCellWindow" as Window
participant "Cell" as Cell
participant "ReationalOperator" as Operator
participant "Language" as Language
participant "UIController" as UI
participant "ConditionalFormattingCellSideBarExtension" as SideBar

== Use Case Flow ==

Actor -> Action: starts use case
activate Action
Action -> Window: create()
activate Window

Window -> Language: list=getBinaryOperators()
activate Language
deactivate Language

Window -> Operator: getIdentifier()
activate Operator
deactivate Operator

Window --> Actor: asks to choose a operator
activate Actor
Actor -> Window: select one
Actor -> Window: insert value
Actor -> Window: confirms
deactivate Actor

Window -> UI: activecell= getActiveCell()
activate UI
deactivate UI

Window -> Cell: content= getContent()
activate Cell
deactivate Cell

Window -> Operator: checkCondition(value,content)
activate Operator
deactivate Operator

Window -> Cell: setBackgroundColor()
activate Cell
deactivate Cell

Window -> UI: refreshConditionSideBar()
activate UI
deactivate UI

Window -> SideBar: refreshConditionInfo()
activate SideBar
deactivate SideBar

deactivate Window
deactivate Action

@enduml
```
